title: test_coverage is 0.85 — not all tests passed
evidence: retort.db test_coverage=0.85 (1.0 = all pass, 0.0 = none ran). 24 test functions defined across 5 files; 85% pass rate indicates some data-dependent tests may fail.
suggestion: Investigate which tests fail; possible cause is missing data/kaggle/ CSVs in the archive at test time.

title: Dead code in normalize_team partial-match loop
evidence: soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:67-69 — for-loop iterates TEAM_ALIASES but body is just `pass`, producing no effect.
suggestion: Either implement the partial-match logic or remove the dead loop.

title: Use of iterrows() for aggregation is slow on large DataFrames
evidence: soccer_mcp/query.py:59 (head_to_head) and soccer_mcp/query.py:94 (team_record) use iterrows() instead of vectorized pandas operations.
suggestion: Refactor to vectorized operations for better performance on large datasets.

title: No error handling for missing CSV files in data loader
evidence: soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:149-155 — load_all() calls pd.read_csv() directly with no try/except; a missing file crashes the server.
suggestion: Add graceful handling for missing data files.

title: dataset_summary tool goes beyond spec
evidence: soccer_mcp/server.py:144-149 — dataset_summary tool exposes row counts per loaded dataset, useful for debugging but not required by TASK.md.
suggestion: No action needed — useful enhancement beyond spec.
